creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Yusuf Khan from comment #1)
Well, that seems reasonable. It also appeared to me to be
a BSD license, which is a derivative of MIT. But it's
your port, and your call. :)
I'm just trying to add LICENSES to all the ports that are
missing them. If for no other reason; because as I'm a
maintainer, the ports framework makes me wait 10 seconds
to remind me:
/!\ transset-1.0.2_3,1: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please set LICENSE for this port

when building some 300 ports, I might be out 15 minutes of
accumulated warnings. Besides, as a maintainer yourself,
you'd want to correct this anyway, right? ;-)

Best wishes.

--Chris
